meaning: n.提倡者,鼓吹者vt.提倡,鼓吹
examples: He is a strident advocate of nuclear power.
Many experts advocate rewarding your child for good behaviour.
I felt that it was irresponsible to advocate the legalization of drugs.
You advocate doing away with central banks and limiting currency issuance to the amount of foreign reserves.
Local advocate Christopher Scholefield said the change in the law would make cases simpler.
